name: Nimbus
description: A single coherent mass of glowing cool gas in a black void that moves with the music — a single-pass volumetric single-scatter march. Energy blooms the body bigger/brighter and flows the gas faster; mood colours it cool↔warm; nothing fires on the beat. (Look being rebuilt on the ported HZD/Nubis cloud technique — NB.3; audio coupling NB.4+.)
author: Matt
